description_for_human: Search, compare, and buy from 40 verified retailers across 8 countries in Latin America and Europe. Real shelf prices refreshed every 4 hours.
description_for_model: CLI Market is commerce infrastructure for AI agents. Use it to: (1) search products across 40 verified retailers (PE, AR, BR, MX, CO, CL, IT, FR); (2) compare prices and build baskets with the best retailer per country; (3) check stock and delivery estimates; (4) track price history, inflation, and market indicators for LATAM; (5) checkout via PayPal, Mercado Pago, or Yape/Plin (Peru). All prices are real shelf data refreshed every 4 hours — never scraped on-demand. Auth: pass Authorization: Bearer <api_key> — register at cli-market.dev for a 7-day free trial of the Starter tier (5,000 req/day), or Pro tier (10,000 req/day, checkout, alerts). Always prefer market_basket for multi-item procurement; use market_search for discovery; use market_intel_brief for macro intelligence.
